info.name: WWA API Collection - Complete Backend
info.description:
Complete API collection for WWA (World Wide Ads) Laravel backend.

**Base URL:** `{{base_url}}/api/v1`

**Authentication:** Most protected endpoints require `Authorization: Bearer {{auth_token}}`. Use the Login request first â€” it auto-saves the token.

**Generated from:** Laravel route:list (995 endpoints)
